title: ONE DAY for Ched
description:
Wishlist Shop Crush on Steam

Hey friends!

If you survived ONE DAY for Ched (or at least laughed at it), 

Why not wishlist our new game — Shop Crush? 

It’s very different: narrative, weird, full of illusions. 

Your wishlist helps us finish it, and you’ll probably get a game you actually enjoy :)

Об игре

DIVE INTO THE WORLD OF OLD SCHOOL Ched SHOOTERSFight the monsters, shoot 'em up with your skills and powerful guns. Complete the whole story and find out the secrets of Ched's mind. ONE DAY for Ched makes you feel like you're back in the glory days of gaming, and brings you the ultimate in hardcore gameplay, interesting story, and quest elements.

Use your gaming skills to complete the levels and kill all enemies. Victory can be yours, but you will have to fight hard. ONE DAY, Ched will never forgive your mistakes!

ULTIMATE HARDCORE GAMEPLAYPlayer skills mean everything in the world of ONE DAY for Ched. No saves, no health recovering, no margin for error! 

COMIC / CARTOON ART STYLEIn-game graphics are cell-shaded with cartoon-ish render. The story features hand-drawn comics that reveal Ched's story.

EASY TO ENGAGE, HARDCORE TO STAY ENGAGEDONE DAY for Ched runs on a weak PC, has its own charming humor, catchy phrases, low price, and trade cards.
description_short: An indie FPS with brutal difficulty, absurd humor, and chaotic old-school charm - a cult classic born from madness.

upsells.name: One Day For Ched OST - Ched's Wonderful Voice
